log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Shifter — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Shifter — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Shifter — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.

--- Shifter — Bardic Musician --- HP: 46/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

--- Shifter — Bardic Musician --- HP: 46/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
══ ROUND 4 ══
